name: Dokkalfheim Magical University
short_description: University life has never been so magical! Recruit friends, complete story quests, upgrade your equipment and skills, decorate your dorm and so much more! This exciting saga will satiate your desires for witchy themes, turned based battles and side missions!!
detailed_description:
Dokkalfheim Magical University is a turn based battle game in development using RPG Maker MV. The player builds teams of three witches out of a small selection of students and professors at the university as they protect the vulnerable world from the undead of fallen civilizations.

Each witch has two basic spells and an ultimate spell which needs to be charged. The witches are categorized as:

Red Witches, whose spells target enemies

Blue Witches, whose spells target allies

Purple Witches, who have a mix of "red" and "blue" spells.
